zh.lifeSummary: 當John Washbourne於1479年1月8日出生在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾本沃斯時，他的父親John de Washbourne28歲，母親Joan Mitton24歲。他於1516年5月6日與Lady Emme Brittany Bengeworth 在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾本沃斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1546年1月8日在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾伍斯特享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾本沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Washbourne于1479年1月8日出生在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾本沃斯时，他的父亲John de Washbourne28岁，母亲Joan Mitton24岁。他于1516年5月6日与Lady Emme Brittany Bengeworth 在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾本沃斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1546年1月8日在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾伍斯特享年67岁，埋葬在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾本沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: Washbourne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Great and Little Washbourne (Gloucs) or Washbourne in Halwell (Devon). The variant Washburn could also be from Washburn (WR Yorks), but there is comparatively little evidence that this place yielded a surname.

variants.name: Washburn
meanings: English: habitational name from Great and Little Washbourne (Gloucestershire), or Washbourne in Halwell (Devon). The Gloucestershire placename derives from Old English wæsse (genitive wæssan) ‘wet place, swamp, marsh’ + burna ‘spring, stream’. The Devon placename derives from Old English wæsce ‘place for washing’ + burna.
History: John Washburn came to MA in 1626 and settled in Duxbury, MA, in 1632.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Washbourne was born on 8 January 1479, in Bengeworth, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John de Washbourne, was 28 and his mother, Joan Mitton, was 24. He married Lady Emme Brittany Bengeworth  on 6 May 1516, in Bengeworth, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 8 January 1546, in Worcester, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67, and was buried in Bengeworth, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Washbourne est né le 8 janvier 1479, à Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Washbourne, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Joan Mitton, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Lady Emme Brittany Bengeworth  le 6 mai 1516, à Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 8 janvier 1546, à Worcester, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Washbourne am 8. Januar 1479 in Bengeworth, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Washbourne 28 und seine Mutter Joan Mitton 24. Er hat am 6. Mai 1516 in Bengeworth, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom Lady Emme Brittany Bengeworth  geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 8. Januar 1546 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Worcester, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Bengeworth, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Washbourne è nato il il 8 gennaio 1479 nel Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John de Washbourne, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Joan Mitton, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Lady Emme Brittany Bengeworth  il 6 maggio 1516, nel Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 8 gennaio 1546, nel Worcester, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Washbourneが1479年1月8日にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアベンジェウオルスで生まれた時，父John de Washbourneは28歳，母Joan Mittonは24歳であった。1516年5月6日にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアベンジェウオルスでLady Emme Brittany Bengeworth と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1546年1月8日にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウオルセスターで67歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアベンジェウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Washbourne(이)가 1479년 1월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 벤그워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Washbourne(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Mitton(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1516년 5월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 벤그워스에서 Lady Emme Brittany Bengeworth (와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1546년 1월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 워스스터에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 벤그워스에 묻혔다.

pt.8 January 1479–8 January 1546: 8 de janeiro de 1479–8 de janeiro de 1546
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Washbourne nasceu em 8 de janeiro de 1479, em Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Washbourne, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Joan Mitton, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Emme Brittany Bengeworth  em 6 de maio de 1516, em Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de janeiro de 1546, em Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Washbourne родился 8 января 1479 г. в местности бенгюорт, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John de Washbourne было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Mitton, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Emme Brittany Bengeworth  6 мая 1516 г. в местности бенгюорт, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 8 января 1546 г. в местности ворсестир, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности бенгюорт, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.8 January 1479–8 January 1546: 8 de enero de 1479–8 de enero de 1546
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Washbourne nació el 8 de enero de 1479, en Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John de Washbourne, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Joan Mitton, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Lady Emme Brittany Bengeworth  el 6 de mayo de 1516, en Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 8 de enero de 1546, en Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
